artifacts.summary: Analyzed f_nesting_boundary axiom (SuccChainFMCS.lean:615). Found that proof requires showing F-iterations must eventually leave MCS. Key strategy: use Nat.find with classical existence proof. Helper lemmas needed: iter_F_complexity, iter_F_injective. May need to specialize to succ_chain_fam MCS if general MCS approach insufficient. Estimated 1 implementation phase. p_nesting_boundary follows by symmetry.
